text: Iranian sailor Emad Hormozi’s body has been found in the Indian Ocean after about 45 days of being missing, following the sinking of the Iranian warship IRIS Dena by a U.S. Navy submarine.
text_zh: 伊朗海军舰艇IRIS Dena号被美国海军潜艇击沉约45天后，伊朗水手埃马德·霍尔莫兹（Emad Hormozi）的遗体在印度洋被发现。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 The commander of the IRGC’s Quds Force, Esmail Qaani, said after a visit to Baghdad that the formation of a government in Iraq is the right of the Iraqi people. “Iraq is too great for others – especially anti‑humanity criminals – to interfere in its…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kan : Iran’s Quds Force commander, Esmail Qaani – who has not been seen since the war began – has visited Baghdad to coordinate with pro‑Iranian Iraqi militias ahead of a possible resumption of hostilities with the United States. A senior Iraqi political source told the broadcaster that Qaani’s visit aimed to “align” the militias, which attacked U.S. targets in Iraq and the region during the war, and to ensure they are ready for the next round if Pakistani mediation fails. Qaani also sought to secure the appointment of a prime minister favourable to Tehran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）在访问巴格达后表示，在伊拉克组建政府是伊拉克人民的权利。‘伊拉克太伟大了，不容许他人——尤其是反人类罪犯——干涉其……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kan：伊朗圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（自战争开始以来一直未露面）已访问巴格达，以便在可能与美国恢复敌对行动之前与亲伊朗的伊拉克民兵协调。一位伊拉克高级政治消息人士告诉该广播公司，卡尼此行的目的是“整合”那些在战争期间袭击伊拉克和该地区美国目标的民兵，并确保他们在巴基斯坦调解失败的情况下为下一轮冲突做好准备。卡尼还试图确保任命一位对德黑兰友好的总理。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel It's raining crude oil in the Russian city of Tuapse after Ukraine struck a major oil export terminal overnight. @Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046275810114375941/video/1 Ukrainian drones struck Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery overnight, igniting the tank farm. Russian officials reported one dead and one injured, marking the second hit on the Rosneft site in under a week. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 乌克兰连夜袭击了俄罗斯图阿普谢的一个主要石油出口码头后，该市下起了原油雨。@Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046275810114375941/video/1 乌克兰无人机连夜袭击了俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂，点燃了储油罐区。俄罗斯官员报告称有一人死亡、一人受伤，这是不到一周内该俄罗斯石油公司（Rosneft）基地第二次遇袭。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🛬 United States Air Force planes arrive at PAF Nur Khan Air Base in Pakistan's Punjab Province ahead of the Second Round of negotiations between USA and Iran https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046275654056886607/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🛬 美国空军飞机抵达巴基斯坦旁遮普省的努尔汗空军基地，为美伊第二轮谈判做准备 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046275654056886607/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary's PM Péter Magyar says his country would arrest Netanyahu if he enters Hungarian territory, citing the ICC warrant. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046275193807548576/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 匈牙利总理彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）表示，如果内塔尼亚胡进入匈牙利领土，匈牙利将根据国际刑事法院的逮捕令将其逮捕。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046275193807548576/video/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz An Iranian delegation is planning to arrive tomorrow in Pakistan's capital, Islamabad, despite sending mixed messages, according to two senior Iranian officials quoted by the NYT tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 据《纽约时报》援引两名伊朗高级官员的话称，尽管发出了相互矛盾的信息，但伊朗代表团计划明天抵达巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡。推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 📞 🇮🇷 Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov held a phone call with Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, during which Lavrov emphasized the need to maintain the Iran–U.S. ceasefire and continue diplomatic efforts to end the conflict. ➡️ Araghchi confirmed Iran's readiness to do everything in its power to guarantee the safe and uninterrupted passage of Russian ships and cargo through the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 📞 🇮🇷 俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫与伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希通了电话，拉夫罗夫在通话中强调了维持伊美停火并继续通过外交努力结束冲突的必要性。➡️ 阿拉格希确认伊朗已准备好尽其所能，确保俄罗斯船只和货物安全、无阻碍地通过霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: OSINTtechnical It’s raining crude oil in the Russian Black Sea city of Tuapse after Ukrainian forces successfully struck a major oil export terminal tank farm overnight. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046274040172630355/video/1 Russia's Tuapse oil refinery and Black Sea oil export terminal tank farm continues to suffer a catastrophic fire this morning after an overnight Ukrainian drone raid. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046114169896701965/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在乌克兰军队连夜成功袭击了一个主要石油出口码头储油罐区后，俄罗斯黑海城市图阿普谢下起了原油雨。https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2046274040172630355/video/1 俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂和黑海石油出口码头储油罐区在连夜遭受乌克兰无人机袭击后，今晨继续发生灾难性火灾。https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2046114169896701965/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical 推文

text: Open Source Intel Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has dropped to a near standstill after claims it had reopened fell apart. Iran reversed course and reinstated restrictions. Only a handful of vessels have transited since. Oil and gas prices rebounding. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046273570016231545/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 在关于霍尔木兹海峡重新开放的说法破灭后，通过该海峡的交通几乎陷入停滞。伊朗改变了方针并恢复了限制措施。此后只有少数几艘船只通过。石油和天然气价格正在反弹。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046273570016231545/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Pakistani source to Al-Jazeera: The second round of negotiations between Washington and Tehran is expected to begin tomorrow afternoon. The Iranian delegation is expected to arrive in the morning, close to the arrival of the American delegation tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦消息人士向半岛电视台透露：华盛顿与德黑兰之间的第二轮谈判预计将于明天下午开始。伊朗代表团预计将于上午抵达，时间接近美国代表团的抵达时间。推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. will host a second round of Ambassador-level talks between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday at the State Department. - U.S. State Department tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国将于周四在国务院主办以色列与黎巴嫩之间第二轮大使级会谈。- 美国国务院推文

text: WarTranslated A satellite image has appeared online showing the burning oil refinery in Tuapse, Russia, which was attacked by drones again tonight. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046271779790799268/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 网上出现了一张卫星图像，显示了俄罗斯图阿普谢正在燃烧的炼油厂，该炼油厂今晚再次遭到无人机袭击。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046271779790799268/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Argentina's President Javier Milei: "With certain cultures, it's not possible to coexist." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046271275694182705/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱：“对于某些文化，共存是不可能的。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046271275694182705/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 NYT: An Iranian delegation is preparing to travel to Islamabad on Tuesday for potential negotiations with the U.S., with Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf expected to attend. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 《纽约时报》：伊朗代表团正准备于周二前往伊斯兰堡进行潜在的对美谈判，预计伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫将出席。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 An Israeli official told Channel 12: "Israel is preparing to resume fighting with Iran at any moment. The Air Force continues its preparations and maneuvers, with pilots on standby at their bases". tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 一位以色列官员告诉第12频道：“以色列正准备随时恢复与伊朗的战斗。空军继续其准备工作和演习，飞行员在基地待命”。推文

text: Open Source Intel A Pakistani source tells Al Jazeera that the second round of U.S.-Iran talks is expected to begin tomorrow at noon, with both delegations arriving tomorrow morning. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一位巴基斯坦消息人士告诉半岛电视台，美伊第二轮会谈预计将于明天中午开始，双方代表团将于明天上午抵达。推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says its forces eliminated terrorists in three separate incidents in southern Lebanon today. All had violated the ceasefire and approached troops near Bint Jbeil and the Litani River. Airstrikes were called in shortly after detection. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军称，其部队今天在黎巴嫩南部三起独立事件中消灭了恐怖分子。所有人都违反了停火协议，并接近了宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）和利塔尼河（Litani River）附近的部队。在发现后不久即进行了空袭。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan : A senior Israeli official said the United States and Iran are not close to an agreement, and that Israel is ready to return to war in Iran with American approval. “We are all waiting for Trump, but the sides are not close to agreement,” the official said. U.S. President Trump told PBS that a deal would be signed today in Pakistan, but warned that if the ceasefire expires tomorrow evening without an agreement, “many bombs will be launched.” Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said Americans seek Iranian submission, but Iran does not surrender to force. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：一位以色列高级官员表示，美国和伊朗尚未达成协议，以色列已准备好在获得美国批准的情况下重返伊朗战场。该官员说：“我们都在等待特朗普，但双方并未接近达成协议。”美国总统特朗普告诉PBS，协议将于今天在巴基斯坦签署，但他警告说，如果停火协议在明天傍晚到期而未达成协议，“将投下许多炸弹”。伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安表示，美国人寻求伊朗屈服，但伊朗不会向武力投降。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: Pakistani Interior Minister Naqvi said that “foolproof security arrangements” have been put in place for foreign delegations, as preparations for another round of negotiations with the U.S. are underway. Security is a key concern for Tehran, following the killing of several Iranian officials in recent U.S. and Israeli strikes. The Serena Hotel in Islamabad, which hosted the first round of talks earlier this month, has reportedly been cleared of guests, while thousands of additional security personnel have been deployed across the city. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：巴基斯坦内政部长纳克维表示，已为外国代表团采取了“万无一失的安全措施”，因为与美国的另一轮谈判准备工作正在进行中。在几名伊朗官员在最近的美国和以色列袭击中丧生后，安全是德黑兰的一个关键关切。据报道，本月初主办第一轮会谈的伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店（Serena Hotel）已清空了客人，同时数千名额外的安全人员已部署在整个城市。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Japan Rejects Takaichi’s War Path: 36,000 Demand Peace with Iran Around 36,000 protesters rallied outside Japan’s parliament on April 19. Demonstrator demanding "No to War," "Protection of Article 9," and the resignation of hard-line conservative Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi. Japanese firmly rejected any involvement in the U.S.-Israeli conflict against Iran and closer ties with Trump. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 日本拒绝高市早苗的战争路线：36,000人要求与伊朗和平。4月19日，约36,000名抗议者在日本国会外集会。示威者要求“拒绝战争”、“保护第9条”以及强硬派保守党首相高市早苗辞职。日本人坚决拒绝参与美以针对伊朗的冲突，并拒绝与特朗普建立更紧密的关系。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Iran is considering participating in peace talks with the US in Pakistan, Reuters correspondent Parisa Hafezi reported, citing a senior Iranian official — though a final decision has not yet been made. Al Jazeera, citing a Pakistani source, reports that a second round of US-Iran negotiations is expected to take place on Tuesday afternoon, with both delegations arriving in the morning. Pakistani officials say preparations are already underway. Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi confirmed that "foolproof security arrangements have been made for foreign delegations" — a key concern for Tehran, given that numerous Iranian officials have been killed in US and Israeli strikes. The Serena Hotel in Islamabad, which hosted the first round earlier this month, has been cleared of guests, and thousands of additional security personnel have been deployed across the city. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据路透社记者帕里萨·哈菲兹（Parisa Hafezi）援引一位伊朗高级官员的话报道，伊朗正在考虑参加在巴基斯坦举行的美伊和平谈判——尽管尚未做出最终决定。半岛电视台援引一位巴基斯坦消息人士的话报道称，美伊第二轮谈判预计将于周二下午举行，双方代表团将于上午抵达。巴基斯坦官员表示，准备工作已经在进行中。内政部长莫辛·纳克维（Mohsin Naqvi）证实，“已为外国代表团采取了万无一失的安全措施”——鉴于许多伊朗官员在美以袭击中丧生，这是德黑兰的一个关键关切。本月初主办第一轮会谈的伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店已清空了客人，数千名额外的安全人员已部署在整个城市。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. Vice President Vance is expected to depart Washington on Tuesday for Pakistan to participate in the latest round of talks with Iran. A second round of negotiations between U.S. and Iranian delegations is currently planned for Wednesday in Islamabad, though officials cautioned the situation remains fluid amid ongoing tensions and public rhetoric. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：美国副总统万斯预计将于周二离开华盛顿前往巴基斯坦，参加与伊朗的最新一轮会谈。目前计划于周三在伊斯兰堡举行美伊代表团之间的第二轮谈判，但官员们提醒称，在持续的紧张局势和公开言论中，局势仍然不稳定。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸⚡️FBI Director Kash Patel just dropped a $250 MILLION defamation bomb on The Atlantic and reporter Sarah Fitzpatrick. The article claimed “bouts of excessive drinking” and unexplained absences. Patel says it’s “categorically false” and a “fabricated hit…" 🇺🇸 Key allegations against Kash Patel — The Atlantic ➡️ Erratic behavior & judgment Patel panicked and frantically called aides claiming he'd been fired after a routine IT login error — what officials described as a full "freak-out." The article characterizes him as erratic, suspicious, and prone to jumping to conclusions without evidence. ➡️ Excessive drinking Multiple officials raised concerns about his alcohol use as a national security vulnerability. He was filmed chugging beer on official travel in Italy, prompting Trump — who doesn't drink — to call him personally to express displeasure. Officials question whether alcohol contributed to instances where Patel shared inaccurate information about active investigations. ➡️ Abuse of perks & poor attendance Patel has drawn criticism at the White House for spotty office attendance and use of the FBI jet for personal travel, with aides reportedly fearing Trump's reaction if he focused on those stories. ➡️ Politicizing the FBI Patel has directed purges of agents he considers insufficiently loyal to Trump, fired staff, opened internal investigations, and pressured agents to quit for pushing back on his directives. Employees are polygraphed to identify leakers — and reportedly asked whether they've ever said anything critical of Patel or the president. ➡️ National security concerns Days before the US launched operations against Iran, Patel fired members of a counterintelligence squad focused in part on Iran. Officials say the rushed firings left the US shorthanded at a critical moment. High turnover and leadership vacuums are described as eroding the FBI's ability to detect and counter terrorist threats. ➡️ Job insecurity Senior Trump administration officials are already discussing potential replacements, and FBI staff are described as waiting for the official word that he's out. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇺🇸⚡️FBI局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）刚刚向《大西洋月刊》和记者莎拉·菲茨帕特里克（Sarah Fitzpatrick）投下了一枚2.5亿美元的诽谤炸弹。该文章声称他有‘酗酒发作’和无法解释的缺勤。帕特尔称这是‘绝对虚假’的，是一篇‘捏造的抹黑文章……’” 🇺🇸 对卡什·帕特尔的主要指控 — 《大西洋月刊》 ➡️ 行为与判断力反复无常 帕特尔在一次常规IT登录错误后惊慌失措，疯狂致电助手声称自己被解雇了——官员们将其描述为彻底的“崩溃”。文章将他描述为反复无常、多疑，且容易在没有证据的情况下妄下结论。 ➡️ 酗酒 多名官员对他的饮酒问题表示担忧，认为这构成了国家安全漏洞。他曾被拍到在意大利执行公务期间狂饮啤酒，促使不喝酒的特朗普亲自致电表达不满。官员们质疑酒精是否导致了帕特尔分享有关正在进行的调查的不准确信息。 ➡️ 滥用职权与出勤率低 帕特尔在白宫因办公室出勤率不稳定和使用FBI专机进行私人旅行而受到批评，据报道，助手们担心如果特朗普关注这些报道会作何反应。 ➡️ 将FBI政治化 帕特尔主导清洗了他认为对特朗普不够忠诚的特工，解雇员工，开启内部调查，并向那些反对他指令的特工施压要求其辞职。员工被要求接受测谎以识别泄密者——据报道，他们还被问及是否曾发表过对帕特尔或总统的批评言论。 ➡️ 国家安全担忧 在美国对伊朗采取行动的前几天，帕特尔解雇了反间谍小组的成员，该小组的部分工作重点是伊朗。官员们表示，仓促的解雇导致美国在关键时刻人手不足。高离职率和领导层真空被描述为削弱了FBI发现和反击恐怖威胁的能力。 ➡️ 工作不稳定性 特朗普政府的高级官员已经在讨论潜在的继任者，FBI员工被描述为正在等待他离职的正式通知。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Capitol Police arrested a group of U.S. veterans protesting the Iran war inside the Cannon House Office Building today. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046267636950933992/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel FOX: "Are you suggesting that Obama's leadership on Iran was better?" KHANNA: "Yes, I am" FOX: "Under President Obama there were 14 wire transfers to a Swiss account linked to Hezbollah...he also sent pallets of cash in a plane..." KHANNA: “Barack Obama was a great statesman" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046267113950646691/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 福克斯新闻：“你是在暗示奥巴马在伊朗问题上的领导力更好吗？” 卡纳（KHANNA）：“是的，我是这么认为的” 福克斯新闻：“在奥巴马总统任期内，有14笔电汇转入与真主党有关的瑞士账户……他还用飞机运送了成托盘的现金……” 卡纳：“巴拉克·奥巴马是一位伟大的政治家” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046267113950646691/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @gbrew24 : Now reported that Vance will not be leaving until tomorrow. It takes 16 hours to get to Islamabad. That means discussions can really only start Weds. morning ET, which is Weds. evening local time. Ceasefire technically expires Tuesday. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @gbrew24：现报道万斯（Vance）要到明天才会离开。前往伊斯兰堡需要16个小时。这意味着讨论实际上只能在美东时间周三上午，即当地时间周三晚上开始。停火协议在技术上周二到期。推文

text: Open Source Intel IranWire: The captain of the Touska, seized by U.S. Marines after being disabled, is an IRGC operative who intentionally ignored repeated warnings. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046265655364669478/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 IranWire：被美国海军陆战队扣押的Touska号货轮的船长是一名伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）特工，他故意无视了多次警告。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046265655364669478/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz The US escalation is meant to increase pressure on Iran, but there is also a clock running for how long this will last without fighting. It takes time for the blockade to bite, but when it does, we can expect that Iran will resume its attacks (and with it, the war) The U.S. military is preparing to expand its blockade in coming days by boarding Iran-linked oil tankers and seizing commercial ships in international waters, according to U.S. officials quoted by the WSJ - Michael A. Horowitz tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz） 美国的升级旨在增加对伊朗的压力，但距离爆发战斗的时间也在倒计时。封锁生效需要时间，但一旦生效，我们可以预期伊朗将恢复攻击（随之而来的是战争）。据《华尔街日报》援引美国官员的话称，美军正准备在未来几天扩大封锁，登临与伊朗有关的油轮并在国际水域扣押商船。 - 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz The U.S. military is preparing to expand its blockade in coming days by boarding Iran-linked oil tankers and seizing commercial ships in international waters, according to U.S. officials quoted by the WSJ tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 据《华尔街日报》援引美国官员的话称，美军正准备在未来几天扩大封锁，登临与伊朗有关的油轮并在国际水域扣押商船。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @PHREUTERS : A senior Iranian official tells me that Tehran is considering attending peace talks with the U.S. in Pakistan,but that no decision has been made yet. @ReutersIran tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @PHREUTERS：一位伊朗高级官员告诉我，德黑兰正在考虑参加在巴基斯坦举行的与美国的和平谈判，但尚未做出决定。 @ReutersIran 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz US military says it directed 27 vessels to return back to Iranian ports. Since the commencement of the blockade against ships entering or exiting Iranian ports and coastal areas, U.S. forces have directed 27 vessels to turn around or return to an Iranian port. - U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 美军称已指挥27艘船只返回伊朗港口。自针对进出伊朗港口和沿海地区的船只实施封锁以来，美军已指挥27艘船只掉头或返回伊朗港口。 - 美国中央司令部 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 NYT: An Iranian delegation is preparing to travel to Islamabad on Tuesday for potential negotiations with the U.S., with Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf expected to attend. @wfwitness

The article claimed “bouts of excessive drinking” and unexplained absences. Patel says it’s “categorically false” and a “fabricated hit piece.” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The IDF reports it has killed two Hamas operatives in separate strikes in the central Gaza Strip. Ayman Hosna was targeted on Sunday and was involved in manufacturing and repairing weapons used in attacks against IDF troops. In a separate strike on Monday, the IDF said it killed Anas Khaled Saafi, who it claims was planning an attack against Israeli forces in the immediate timeframe. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列国防军报告称，其在加沙地带中部的单独袭击中击毙了两名哈马斯成员。艾曼·霍斯纳（Ayman Hosna）于周日成为目标，他曾参与制造和维修用于袭击以色列国防军部队的武器。在周一的另一次袭击中，以色列国防军称击毙了阿纳斯·哈立德·萨菲（Anas Khaled Saafi），据称他当时正计划在近期内对以色列军队发动袭击。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 No one in the US seems to know what's actually happening with the talks. Reporting is all over the place — from a deal being signed today, to talks scheduled for Wednesday, to Schrödinger's Vance: simultaneously en route to Pakistan and still in the US. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国似乎没人知道谈判到底发生了什么。报道众说纷纭——从今天签署协议，到定于周三进行的谈判，再到“薛定谔的万斯”：既在前往巴基斯坦的途中，又还在美国国内。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Argentina's President Javier Milei: With certain cultures, it’s not possible to coexist.
text_zh: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱：对于某些文化，共存是不可能的。

text: 🇷🇺 🇩🇪 The German Foreign Ministry summoned Russian Ambassador to Berlin Sergei Nechayev in connection with the publication by the Russian Defense Ministry of the addresses of drone manufacturers for Kiev located in Europe "Direct threats from Russia against targets in Germany are an attempt to weaken our support for Ukraine and test our unity," the message said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇩🇪 德国外交部召见了俄罗斯驻柏林大使谢尔盖·涅恰耶夫，原因与俄罗斯国防部公布了位于欧洲的基辅无人机制造商地址有关。声明称：“俄罗斯对德国目标的直接威胁，是试图削弱我们对乌克兰的支持并考验我们的团结。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🟨 🇮🇷 The U.S. Embassy in Iraq has issued a security alert for U.S. citizens in the country, warning that Iranian aligned militias in the country continue to target U.S. citizens. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🟨 🇮🇷 美国驻伊拉克大使馆向在伊拉克的美国公民发布了安全警报，警告称该国境内的伊朗支持的民兵组织继续以美国公民为目标。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Iran has expressed readiness to do everything possible to ensure the unimpeded passage of Russian vessels and cargo through the Strait of Hormuz, Russia's Foreign Ministry announced. Sergei Lavrov held a phone call with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. Key points: ➡️ Araghchi briefed Lavrov on Iran's position regarding US ceasefire violations, including the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and the seizure of an Iranian container ship. ➡️ Moscow emphasized the importance of maintaining the ceasefire and continuing diplomatic efforts toward conflict resolution. ➡️ Russia expressed readiness to facilitate agreements between Iran and the Gulf states. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 俄罗斯外交部宣布，伊朗已表示准备尽一切可能确保俄罗斯船只和货物畅通无阻地通过霍尔木兹海峡。谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫与伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希进行了通话。要点：➡️ 阿拉格希向拉夫罗夫通报了伊朗关于美国违反停火协议的立场，包括封锁霍尔木兹海峡和扣押一艘伊朗集装箱船。➡️ 莫斯科强调了维持停火和继续外交努力以解决冲突的重要性。➡️ 俄罗斯表示愿意促进伊朗与海湾国家之间的协议。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, The Irishman in Russia 🇷🇺: Here in Ireland there's a sense the people are close to breaking point. Its not just about Fuel, it's about decades of political ineptitude, corruption and a creeping disdain for the ordinary people by the Globalist elites in power. Their loyalties are to anyone but the people Follow me Irish Man In Russia and Bowes Chay on X, Chay Bowes
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, 俄罗斯的爱尔兰人 🇷🇺：在爱尔兰，人们感觉已经到了崩溃的边缘。这不仅仅是关于燃料，更是关于几十年的政治无能、腐败，以及掌权的全球主义精英对普通民众日益增长的蔑视。他们的忠诚对象是除了人民以外的任何人。请在X上关注我：Irish Man In Russia 和 Bowes Chay，Chay Bowes

text: Péter Magyar says he would arrest Netanyahu if he comes to Hungary: I made it clear that Hungary intends to remain a member of the International Criminal Court. If someone enters the territory of a country that is a member of the ICC and that person is under an arrest warrant, then they must be taken into custody.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）表示，如果内塔尼亚胡来到匈牙利，他会将其逮捕：我已明确表示，匈牙利打算继续作为国际刑事法院的成员国。如果有人进入国际刑事法院成员国的领土，且此人身负逮捕令，那么他们必须被拘留。

text: Open Source Intel Around 200 tourists were temporarily stranded on Morro Dois Irmãos, a well known hiking peak in Rio de Janeiro’s Vidigal area, after a police raid targeting the Comando Vermelho, one of Brazil’s largest criminal gangs. Gunfire broke out during the operation, forcing visitors to stay on the mountain for safety. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：在里约热内卢维迪加尔地区，由于警方针对巴西最大的犯罪团伙之一“红色司令部”（Comando Vermelho）进行突袭，约200名游客被暂时困在著名的徒步山峰“双子峰”（Morro Dois Irmãos）上。行动期间爆发了枪战，迫使游客留在山上以确保安全。推文

text: Open Source Intel REPORT 🔴 France 24: Maritime security sources say the seized Iranian flagged vessel Touska likely carried dual use cargo that Washington considers potentially usable for military purposes https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046256060596461696/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iranian President: “Honoring commitments is the basis of meaningful dialogue. Deep historical mistrust in Iran toward U.S. gov conduct remains, while unconstructive & contradictory signals from American officials carry a bitter message; they seek Iran's surrender. Iranians do not submit to force.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗总统：“履行承诺是进行有意义对话的基础。伊朗对美国政府行为的深层历史不信任依然存在，而美国官员发出的非建设性且相互矛盾的信号传递了一个苦涩的信息；他们寻求伊朗的投降。伊朗人不会屈服于武力。”推文
